footer.description: Bringing the ancient art of tea ceremony to Wellington. Experience tranquility, mindfulness, and the beauty of tea culture.

hero.title: Experience the Art of Tea
hero.description: Discover the ancient traditions of tea ceremony in Wellington, where every cup tells a story of mindfulness and connection.

intro.title: Why Moso Tea
intro.description: We bring the ancient art of tea ceremony to New Zealand, creating moments of peace and connection in our carefully curated space.
intro.feature1Description: Traditional tea ceremonies guided by certified tea masters trained in classical techniques.
intro.feature2Description: Maximum 8 guests per session ensures personalized attention and meaningful connection.
intro.feature3Description: Our serene garden space offers a peaceful retreat from the bustling city life.

classic.title: Classic Tea Ceremony
classic.description: A complete introduction to the art of tea, including traditional brewing techniques and tea appreciation.

matcha.title: Matcha Meditation
matcha.description: Combine mindfulness meditation with the ceremonial preparation of Japanese matcha green tea.

private.title: Private Garden Session
private.description: An exclusive tea ceremony experience for up to 4 guests in our private garden pavilion.

testimonials.title: Guest Reflections
testimonials.quote1: A truly transformative experience. The attention to detail and the peaceful atmosphere made me feel like I was transported to another world.
testimonials.quote2: The perfect escape from city life. I've attended three sessions now and each one brings new insights and a sense of calm.
testimonials.quote3: An authentic and beautifully curated tea ceremony. The tea master's knowledge and gentle guidance made it accessible for beginners like me.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: Sharing the art of tea since 2021

story.title: A Journey of Tea
story.p1: Moso Tea was born from a simple yet profound love for the art of tea ceremony. Founded in 2021, our studio has become a sanctuary for those seeking moments of stillness in Wellington.
story.p2: The name "Moso" comes from the moso bamboo, known for its remarkable patience and growth. Just as the bamboo spends years developing strong roots before its spectacular emergence, we believe in the power of quiet cultivation and mindful presence.
story.p3: What began as a small gathering of tea enthusiasts has grown into a beloved community space where people from all walks of life come together to experience the meditative beauty of tea culture.
story.p4: Our lifestyle farm studio in Wainuiomata offers a rare opportunity to step away from the everyday and immerse yourself in an ancient tradition that celebrates the simple act of preparing and sharing tea.

philosophy.quote: In the simple act of making tea, we find a path to presence. Each cup is an invitation to slow down, to breathe, and to connect with the moment.
philosophy.quoteZh: 在泡茶的簡單動作中，我們找到了通往當下的道路。每一杯茶都是一份邀請，讓我們放慢腳步，深呼吸，與當下連結。

expect.title: What to Expect
expect.item1Description: Our certified tea masters bring years of training and deep cultural knowledge to every session.
expect.item2Description: Maximum 8 guests ensures a personal, unhurried experience with meaningful interaction.
expect.item3Description: Premium teas, traditional utensils, and light refreshments are included in every experience.
expect.item4Description: Our sessions are designed to give you time to fully absorb and appreciate each moment.

host.name: Mei Lin Chen
host.p1: Mei Lin's journey with tea began in her grandmother's kitchen in Taiwan, where she learned that tea is more than a beverage — it's a way of life.
host.p2: After training for five years in both Chinese gongfu cha and Japanese chanoyu traditions, she moved to New Zealand with a dream of sharing this ancient art with a new audience.
host.p3: When not hosting ceremonies, Mei Lin tends to the Moso Tea garden, practices calligraphy, and continues to deepen her understanding of tea culture through ongoing study and travel.
host.quote: My greatest joy is watching guests discover the peace that tea can bring. Each ceremony is a gift I'm honored to share.

cta.title: Ready to Experience Tea?
cta.description: Join us for an unforgettable journey into the art of tea ceremony. Book your experience today and discover the tranquility that awaits.

hero.title: Our Experiences
hero.description: Each experience at Moso Tea is crafted to guide you into a state of presence and appreciation. Whether you seek relaxation, learning, or connection, there is a tea journey for you.

classic.title: Classic Tea Ceremony
classic.description: Immerse yourself in the timeless art of traditional tea preparation. Learn the graceful movements, proper techniques, and philosophy behind each step of the ceremony. This foundational experience is perfect for beginners and tea enthusiasts alike.

matcha.title: Matcha Meditation
matcha.description: Combine the contemplative practice of meditation with the ceremonial preparation of Japanese matcha. Begin with guided breathing exercises, then mindfully prepare and savour vibrant green matcha in a state of calm awareness.

private.title: Private Garden Session
private.description: An exclusive tea ceremony experience in our private garden pavilion. Ideal for special occasions, intimate gatherings, or those seeking a deeply personal tea journey. Includes a curated selection of premium teas and seasonal treats.

included.title: What's Included
included.item1Description: A curated selection of high-quality loose leaf teas sourced from renowned tea regions.
included.item2Description: Traditional teaware, utensils, and all necessary materials for your ceremony experience.
included.item3Description: Personal instruction from our experienced tea master throughout your session.
included.item4Description: Handcrafted confections that complement your tea, changing with the seasons.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: Do I need any prior experience with tea ceremonies?
faq.a1: Not at all! Our experiences are designed for all levels, from complete beginners to seasoned tea enthusiasts. Our tea master will guide you through every step, ensuring you feel comfortable and engaged throughout the session.
faq.q2: What should I wear to a tea ceremony?
faq.a2: We recommend comfortable, modest clothing in muted colours. You'll be seated on cushions on the floor, so loose-fitting trousers or a long skirt work well. Please remove your shoes upon entering the tea room.
faq.q3: Can I book for a special occasion or event?
faq.a3: Absolutely! Our Private Garden Session is perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, team gatherings, or any special celebration. Contact us to discuss customised arrangements, including extended sessions or catering options.
faq.q4Zh: 場地是否方便輪椅進出？
faq.a4: Our main tea room is accessible via a ground-level entrance. We can also arrange seating accommodations for guests who may have difficulty sitting on the floor. Please let us know your requirements when booking.
faq.a5: We offer full refunds for cancellations made at least 48 hours before your scheduled session. Cancellations within 48 hours may be rescheduled subject to availability. Please contact us if you have any concerns about your booking.

experiences.ctaDescription: We're happy to help you find the perfect tea journey. Reach out and we'll guide you based on your interests, group size, and occasion.
